daily_milestones.summary: Full-scale API Health Monitor & Prediction Engine Stabilization
architectural_updates: Dual-Session Prediction Engine: Implemented logic for both AM (11:30 AM) and PM (03:30 PM) near-final predictions based on SET Index momentum.
API Health & Quota Monitor: Built a real-time dashboard to track Token usage (1M/min limit) and Request counts (1,500/day limit).
Localization: Successfully translated the system UI and diagnostic screens into Burmese.
technical_fixes: TypeError Resolution: Fixed the 'reading safe' null-pointer error in the ApiHealth component using optional chaining and default states.
Data Integration: Verified live SET/Value stream mapping from Thaistock2d API to ensure 100% accuracy in predictions.
Generative Capability Tracking: Added monitoring for Veo (Video) and Lyria 3 (Music) quotas as per Google AI Studio standards.
strategic_decisions: Billing Strategy: Decided to continue with the Google AI Studio Free Tier for development and switch to 'Pay-as-you-go' only after the system stabilizes and scales.
Second Brain Structure: Linked historical results from May 11 (56, 99) as the primary learning nodes for the pattern recognition agent.
